description:
The AxisDistanceHapticFilter multiplicatively changes the intensity of a HapticVolume depending on the dot product from the vector of the device's position in local space to this component and ``Axis``. Essentially the smaller the angle between the device local position from 0 direction and the ``Axis`` direction the smaller the distance.

This works as part of the game's robust Haptics system.

fields.Axis: The axis to check distance from.
fields.StartDistance: The starting distance to map to ``StartIntensity`` for the intensity distance range.
fields.EndDistance: The ending distance to map to ``EndIntensity`` for the intensity distance range.
fields.StartIntensity: When at ``StartDistance`` map the device intensity to this.
fields.EndIntensity: When at ``EndDistance`` map the device intensity to this.
fields.Power: How much to amplify the haptics effect in general.

usage: Attach to a slot with a valid and working HapticVolume to add to the list of multiplicative haptic filters.
